llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Supervisor, Transport Management
job.description: 1. Strategic business engagement: Participate in the development and implementation of G-EDM's business strategy, process improvements, and digitalization initiatives. Enhance business competitiveness by introducing new concepts and establishing expert networks. Advocate for process improvements and digitalization to relevant stakeholders. 2. Process Improvement Digitalization - NGBA steering associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Transport Management processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to all modes of transportation. Guide Supply Chain team members across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and align with best practices. 3. Change Management - Technical Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Transportation Management. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 4. Stakeholder Management Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in planning in Transportation Management. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Transportation Management topics. Build internal G-EDM Logistics Transport Management expert community.
